metadata.description: Aggressive-growth equity research plugin for Claude Code, built on the Yahoo Finance MCP

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Aggressive-growth equity research and portfolio analysis for US markets (NYSE/NASDAQ). Runs a 7-phase deep-dive framework with mandatory quantified risk callouts on every rating. Handles multi-format portfolio intake (Excel, CSV, screenshots, broker PDFs, typed text) and ships slash commands for research, portfolio review, options flow, ETF analysis, sector briefings, and rebalance plans.
